| 1 | BENE_ID | CCW Beneficiary ID | 

 | 2 | MSIS_ID | Encrypted State Assigned Beneficiary Unique Identifier | 

 | 3 | STATE_CD | Submitting State Alpha Abbreviation | 

 | 4 | MME_TYPE_CD | Medicare — Medicaid Eligibility Type Code: Annual Dual Eligibility Status | 

 | 5 | SAMPLE_GRP | Sample Group Indicator — 1% | 

 | 6 | BIRTH_DT | Date of Birth | 

 | 7 | AGE | Age (in years) | 

 | 8 | ALIVE_MOS | Months Alive | 

 | 9 | BENE_DEATH_DT | Beneficiary Date of Death | 

 | 10 | SEX_CD |
